listings.name: TA Montgomery #111
listings.description: TravelCenters of America full-service truck stop on the south side of Montgomery at I-65 Exit 168 (US-80/US-82). Country Pride restaurant, CAT scale, TA Truck Service shop, showers, and Reserve-It reserved parking.
listings.corroboration: Name, 980 W South Blvd Montgomery 36105, phone 334-288-3700, Exit 168, and amenities (CAT scale, 2 service bays, Country Pride, ~125 spaces) corroborated across the official TA-Petro page, TruckMap, iExit, and truckstopsandservices.

listings.name: Flying J Travel Center #604
listings.description: Pilot Flying J-operated Flying J Travel Center at I-65 Exit 158 in Hope Hull (south of Montgomery). 24-hour full-service truck stop with CAT scale, Denny's, showers, and diesel/DEF lanes.
listings.corroboration: 900 Tyson Rd, Hope Hull, Exit 158, phone 334-613-0212, CAT scale, ~145 spaces, and Denny's corroborated across the official Pilot Flying J locator, TruckMap, truckstopsandservices, and ParkAdvisor. ZIP 36043 (Hope Hull) used; one aggregator showed 36047 in error.

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #718
listings.description: Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 158 in Hope Hull (opened December 2017). 24-hour truck stop with CAT scale, three truck service bays (Love's Truck Care), showers, and Chester's Chicken / Godfather's Pizza / Subway.
listings.corroboration: 1127 Tyson Rd, Hope Hull 36043, Exit 158, phone 334-280-0009, 96 spaces, 8 showers, 3 service bays, and CAT scale corroborated across Love's official store page/press release, truckstopsandservices, and Find Truck Service.

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #225
listings.description: Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 93 (US-84) in Evergreen, Conecuh County. 24-hour truck stop with CAT scale, showers, and Arby's / Godfather's Pizza.
listings.corroboration: 16101 US-84, Evergreen 36401, Exit 93, phone 251-578-4496, 7 showers, and CAT scale corroborated across Love's official page, truckstopsandservices, and Find Truck Service. Truck-space count left blank due to conflicting figures (159 vs 90) between sources.

listings.name: Yellow Hammer Travel Center
listings.description: Independent (Roady's/NATSN network) travel center at I-65 Exit 69 (AL-41) near Brewton. 24-hour operation with C-store, Crossroad Cafe, diesel, showers, and truck parking.
listings.corroboration: Name, Exit 69 Brewton, and phone 251-296-3474 corroborated across NATSN, Find Truck Service, truckstopsandservices, iExit, and ParkAdvisor. Street address and ZIP left blank because a directory value (13315 Hwy 13) conflicts with the AL-41 exit context and could not be independently confirmed.

listings.name: CAT Scale — TA Montgomery, Montgomery
listings.description: CAT Scale located at the TA Montgomery travel center, I-65 Exit 168.
listings.corroboration: CAT scale presence at TA Montgomery confirmed on the official TA-Petro location page and truckstopsandservices amenity list.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Flying J Travel Center #604, Hope Hull
listings.description: CAT Scale located at the Flying J Travel Center #604, I-65 Exit 158, Hope Hull.
listings.corroboration: CAT scale at Hope Hull Exit 158 / 900 Tyson Rd (Flying J) confirmed via the Pilot Flying J amenity list and CAT Scale Alabama listing (phone 334-613-0212).

listings.name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #718, Hope Hull
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Love's Travel Stop #718, I-65 Exit 158, Hope Hull.
listings.corroboration: CAT scale at Love's #718 (Tyson Rd, Exit 158) confirmed via Love's amenity listing and CAT Scale Alabama listing (phone 334-280-0009).

listings.name: CAT Scale — Speedway, Hope Hull
listings.description: CAT Scale at the Speedway fuel center, I-65 Exit 158, Hope Hull (announced by CAT Scale as a new location).
listings.corroboration: CAT Scale official news page announces a scale at 'Speedway, I-65 & Exit 158, Hope Hull, AL'; Speedway store located at 821 Tyson Rd per speedway.com. CAT Scale Alabama listing shows matching phone 334-450-2351.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #225, Evergreen
listings.description: CAT Scale located at Love's Travel Stop #225, I-65 Exit 93 (US-84), Evergreen.
listings.corroboration: CAT scale at Love's #225 Evergreen (Exit 93 / Hwy 84) confirmed via Love's amenity listing and CAT Scale Alabama listing (phone 251-578-4496).

listings.name: TA Truck Service — Montgomery
listings.description: TA Truck Service commercial truck repair shop co-located at TA Montgomery (I-65 Exit 168). Tire repair/sales, truck & trailer mechanical repair, DOT inspections; two service bays.
listings.corroboration: TA Truck Service listed as a distinct commercial truck repair business at 980 W South Blvd on Yelp and Bridgestone Commercial dealer directory; consistent with the 2 service bays / tire repair on the official TA Montgomery page.

listings.name: Love's Truck Care — Love's Travel Stop #718, Hope Hull
listings.description: On-site truck service at Love's #718 (I-65 Exit 158) with three truck service bays for light mechanical/tire and road service.
listings.corroboration: Three truck service bays at Love's #718 confirmed by Love's store description and truckstopsandservices amenity list. Specific service menu not detailed, so amenities kept to confirmed items.

listings.name: Conway Diesel Service — Evergreen
listings.description: Family-owned heavy-duty truck & trailer repair, towing and 24/7 mobile road service near I-65 in Evergreen (Conecuh County). 75-ton rotator, recovery/winch-outs, tires, engine/transmission work.
listings.corroboration: 100 Conway Ln, Evergreen 36401 and phone 251-578-2205 corroborated across Yelp, truckstopsandservices, and 4RoadService. Exit number left blank (directory exit references were inconsistent).

listings.name: I-65 Butler County Rest Area (Southbound)
listings.description: ALDOT rest area on I-65 southbound in Butler County near Greenville, approx. mile marker 133. Restrooms, water, picnic tables, RV dump, and separate truck/car parking. Rebuilt facility reopened November 2025.
listings.hold_reason: Legal overnight-parking status not independently confirmed from an official ALDOT source; exact mile marker (SB ~133) needs official confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Existence, southbound direction, Butler County/Greenville location, truck parking, and RV dump corroborated by restareas.org, ALDOT News Hub (Nov 2025 reopening), and restareasnearme. Overnight legality not stated by any official source, so held.

listings.name: I-65 Butler County Rest Area (Northbound)
listings.description: ALDOT rest area on I-65 northbound in Butler County near Greenville, approx. mile marker 132. Restrooms, water, picnic tables, RV dump, and separate truck/car parking.
listings.hold_reason: Legal overnight-parking status not independently confirmed from an official ALDOT source; exact mile marker (NB ~132) needs official confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Existence, northbound direction, Butler County/Greenville location, truck parking, and RV dump corroborated by restareas.org and restareasnearme (listed phone 334-382-7301). Overnight legality unconfirmed, so held.

listings.name: I-65 Conecuh County Rest Area (Southbound)
listings.description: ALDOT rest area on I-65 southbound in Conecuh County near Evergreen, approx. mile marker 89. Restrooms, water, picnic tables, RV dump, and separate truck/car parking.
listings.hold_reason: Legal overnight-parking status not independently confirmed from an official ALDOT source; exact mile marker (SB ~89) needs official confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Existence, southbound direction, Conecuh County/Evergreen location (~MM 89.1), truck parking, and RV dump corroborated by restareasnearme (listed phone 251-578-4705). Overnight legality unconfirmed, so held.

listings.name: I-65 Conecuh County Rest Area (Northbound)
listings.description: ALDOT rest area on I-65 northbound in Conecuh County near Evergreen, approx. mile marker 84. Restrooms, water, picnic tables, RV dump, and separate truck/car parking.
listings.hold_reason: Legal overnight-parking status not independently confirmed from an official ALDOT source; exact mile marker (NB ~84) needs official confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Existence, northbound direction, Conecuh County/Evergreen location (~MM 84.2), truck parking, and RV dump corroborated by restareasnearme and alabamarestareas (listed phone 251-966-2505). Overnight legality unconfirmed, so held.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop #360 (Atmore area)
excluded.reason: Could not independently confirm existence/location within this segment. Directory titles reference '#360 | I-65 Exit 58,' but repeated searches of I-65 Exit 57 (AL-21, Atmore) returned only Chevron/Diamond gas — no Love's — and no address, phone, or official Love's page could be verified. Excluded to avoid guessing.

excluded.name: Comfort Inn (Greenville)
excluded.reason: Listed at I-65 Exit 130 in a truck-stop directory, but truck/large-vehicle parking availability could not be independently confirmed; not included as a Hotel with Truck Parking without verification.

excluded.name: I-65 weigh station (Conecuh/Butler counties)
excluded.reason: No official ALDOT/ALEA weigh or inspection station could be confirmed at a specific location/direction in this segment; sources indicate Alabama uses weigh-in-motion. Omitted rather than guess.
